messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
add microsoft binder runtime via nuget

To add the Microsoft Binder Runtime package via NuGet, you can use the Package Manager Console in Visual Studio. Here's how you can do it:

```bash
Install-Package Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces -Version 6.0.0
```

This command will install the Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces package with version 6.0.0 into your project.

If you prefer to use the NuGet Package Manager UI:

1. Right-click on your project in Visual Studio.
2. Click on "Manage NuGet Packages..."
3. Search for "Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces".
4. Click on the "Install" button to add the package to your project. 

Make sure to adjust the version number according to your project's requirements.
